title: Minecraft But Backwards
description: Minecraft But Backwards completely reverses progression; you begin in the End and slowly work your way back to the Overworld.
body:
### Minecraft But Backwards
Minecraft But Backwards completely reverses Minecraft’s normal progression; you begin stranded in the End, defeat the Ender Dragon to escape, survive through the Nether, and finally reach the Overworld.
Every step of the journey is flipped upside down, turning simple milestones into major achievements, where even getting your first wood block becomes the true end goal.

### **Features**
- You Spawn in the End Dimension
- Goal: Wood Log.
- Multiplayer support.
- Custom Objective advancement tab.

### 📦 Installation
This is a Datapack - no mods required.

1. Download the .zip file
2. Open Minecraft and navigate to your world's folder
   - %appdata%\.minecraft\saves\<YourWorldName>\ on Windows
   - ~/Library/Application Support/minecraft/saves/<YourWorldName>/ on macOS
3. Drop the .zip directly into the datapacks folder (do not unzip it)
4. Launch your world and run /reload if the world is already open
5. Watch for the Bebu load message in chat, you're live!


### ❓ FAQ
Q: Does this work with Fabric or Forge mods?

A: Yes. It's a vanilla datapack and runs alongside any mods without conflict.


Q: Can I use this on a server?

A: Absolutely. It's designed with multiplayer in mind.


Q: Does it work on existing worlds?

A: Not tested. Recommended on a Fresh World
